rules.name: Party_Person
rules.description: Extracts person names specifically after 'Beschwerdesache' (standalone), ensuring the name is followed by an address or comma, and excluding common false positives.

rules.name: Nachname_Wie_Bf_Person
rules.description: Captures person names appearing immediately after '(Nachname wie Bf.)' or similar parenthetical name placeholders.

rules.name: Beschwerdesache_Person
rules.description: Captures person names appearing after 'in der Beschwerdesache' or 'gegen den Bescheid ... betreffend', ensuring the name is followed by an address or comma, excluding the comma.

rules.name: Title_Person_General
rules.description: Captures person names starting with a known title, handling multiple consecutive titles and ensuring the full name is captured, including degrees.

rules.name: Frau_Name_Context_Person
rules.description: Captures person names appearing after 'Frau' or 'Herr' (without degree) or in contexts like 'Frau [Name] (Beschwerdeführerin)', ensuring it's a name and not a noun.

rules.name: Context_Person_Strict
rules.description: Captures person names appearing after context phrases like 'des', 'der', 'von', 'gegen', ensuring the full name and optional degree are captured, but strictly filtering out common legal nouns.

rules.name: Party_Name_Context
rules.description: Captures party names following context phrases like 'in der Beschwerdesache', 'des', 'der', 'von', 'gegen', ensuring the match stops before the comma and handles complex degrees. Excludes common legal nouns/departments.

rules.name: Herr_Name_Context
rules.description: Captures names following 'Herrn' (accusative) or 'von Herrn', handling cases without degrees or with degrees, ensuring no trailing spaces.

rules.name: Gegen_Person
rules.description: Captures person names appearing immediately after 'gegen' (accusative) in contexts like 'gegen Ivan Färbers', excluding departments.

rules.name: Judge_Ruler_Person
rules.description: Extracts person names of judges/rulers, often preceded by titles like Richter, Richterin, Mag., Dr., Prof.
